title: Cheap Drones Remain Wild Card in Iran war
summary_full: Stopping Iran’s production of drones is critical to opening the Strait of Hormuz and halting its attacks on Gulf nations. But can it be done?
summary_public: Stopping Iran’s production of drones is critical to opening the Strait of Hormuz and halting its attacks on Gulf nations. But can it be done?

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Stopping Iran’s production of drones is critical to opening the Strait of Hormuz
